case_title: CHU PING XIE VS. LILI TAMARAZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-24-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TAMARAZ, LILI
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: REBECCA WOODSON; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,529.20 FILED BY XIE, CHU PING AS TO DEFENDANT TAMARAZ, LILI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
